# Frontend Architecture Map — ICE Tracker (yzs)

## 1. Routing / Screens

| Route | File | Purpose |
|-------|------|---------|
| `/` | `app/(tabs)/index.tsx` | Map screen with sightings, filters, FAB |
| `/sightings` | `app/(tabs)/sightings.tsx` | Reports list (Recent / Trending / Convoys) |
| `/camera` | `app/camera.tsx` | Camera capture with GPS, navigates to submit |
| `/submit` | `app/submit.tsx` | Submit form (plate, vehicle type, notes) with ALPR |
| `/sighting/[id]` | `app/sighting/[id].tsx` | Sighting detail, voting, mini map |
| `/plate/[licensePlate]` | `app/plate/[licensePlate].tsx` | Plate timeline, watch, export |
| `/oauth/callback` | `app/oauth/callback.tsx` | OAuth callback, session handling |
| `/widget` | `app/widget.tsx` | Embeddable map (web only) |
| `/dev/theme-lab` | `app/dev/theme-lab.tsx` | Theme dev screen |

**Routing stack:** `app/_layout.tsx` (Stack) → `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx` (Tabs: Map, Reports).

---

## 2. Shared UI Components

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `components/screen-container.tsx` | SafeAreaView + background, used by most screens |
| `components/themed-view.tsx` | Theme-aware View |
| `components/ui/icon-symbol.tsx` | MaterialIcons fallback (Android/web) |
| `components/ui/icon-symbol.ios.tsx` | SF Symbols on iOS |
| `components/ui/collapsible.tsx` | Collapsible section |
| `components/haptic-tab.tsx` | Tab button with haptics |
| `components/external-link.tsx` | Link wrapper using expo-router |
| `components/parallax-scroll-view.tsx` | Parallax scroll |
| `components/hello-wave.tsx` | Demo wave animation |

---

## 3. Map / Geolocation Flow

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `components/leaflet-map.tsx` | Leaflet map: markers, clusters, heatmap, user location |
| `hooks/use-proximity-alerts.ts` | Proximity alerts and browser push notifications |

**Geolocation:** Uses `navigator.geolocation` (browser API) in:

- `app/(tabs)/index.tsx` — map center
- `app/(tabs)/sightings.tsx` — distance labels
- `app/camera.tsx` — capture location
- `use-proximity-alerts.ts` — proximity checks

**Map stack:** Leaflet + leaflet.markercluster + leaflet.heat; DOM-based, no `react-native-maps` on web.

---

## 4. Data Fetching

| Location | Mechanism | Endpoints |
|----------|-----------|-----------|
| `lib/trpc.ts` | tRPC + React Query | All API calls |
| `lib/sightings-cache.ts` | AsyncStorage cache | Offline map data |
| `lib/_core/api.ts` | OAuth exchange | `exchangeOAuthCode` |
| `lib/notifications.ts` | localStorage | Watched plates, proximity settings |

**tRPC usage:**

- `sightings.list`, `sightings.getById`, `sightings.create`
- `plates.getByPlate`
- `trending.plates`
- `convoy.detect`
- `votes.cast`, `votes.getUserVote`
- `alpr.extractPlate`

---

## 5. Key Files (One-Line Summary)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `app/_layout.tsx` | Root layout: tRPC, QueryClient, SafeArea, Stack |
| `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx` | Tab bar (Map, Reports) |
| `app/(tabs)/index.tsx` | Map screen with LeafletMap, filters, FAB |
| `app/(tabs)/sightings.tsx` | Reports list with swipe-to-vote |
| `app/camera.tsx` | Web camera + GPS capture |
| `app/submit.tsx` | Submit form with ALPR and reverse geocode |
| `app/sighting/[id].tsx` | Sighting detail with voting and map |
| `app/plate/[licensePlate].tsx` | Plate timeline and watch |
| `app/widget.tsx` | Embeddable Leaflet map |
| `components/leaflet-map.tsx` | Leaflet map with clusters and heatmap |
| `lib/trpc.ts` | tRPC client setup |
| `lib/sightings-cache.ts` | AsyncStorage sightings cache |
| `lib/notifications.ts` | Push notifications and watched plates |
| `hooks/use-proximity-alerts.ts` | Proximity-based push alerts |
| `hooks/use-colors.ts` | Theme color palette |
| `constants/theme.ts` | Theme tokens |
| `server/routers.ts` | tRPC router definitions |

---

## 6. Expo-Specific vs Next.js-Ready

### Expo-specific (replace for Next.js)

| Item | Location | Migration |
|------|----------|-----------|
| `expo-router` | All screens | Use Next.js App Router |
| `router.push`, `router.back`, `router.replace` | Screens | `useRouter` from `next/navigation` |
| `useLocalSearchParams` | sighting, plate, oauth, submit | `useParams`, `useSearchParams` |
| `Stack`, `Tabs` | `_layout.tsx` | Next.js layouts and route groups |
| `expo-haptics` | submit.tsx | Optional; remove or use `navigator.vibrate` |
| `expo-linking` | oauth/callback | `window.location` or Next.js router |
| `expo-status-bar` | _layout | Remove or use meta tags |
| `expo-symbols` / `@expo/vector-icons` | icon-symbol | Use Lucide, Heroicons, or similar |
| `react-native-safe-area-context` | screen-container, layouts | CSS `env(safe-area-inset-*)` or Tailwind |
| `react-native-gesture-handler` | _layout | Remove for web |
| `@react-native-async-storage/async-storage` | sightings-cache | `localStorage` (or `sessionStorage`) |
| `Platform.OS` checks | Several files | Drop or use `typeof window` |
| `HapticTab` | tabs layout | Standard tab styling |

### Next.js-ready (minimal or no changes)

| Item | Notes |
|------|-------|
| `LeafletMap` | DOM-based; use dynamic import for SSR |
| `navigator.geolocation` | Standard web API |
| `navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia` | Standard web API |
| tRPC client | Works with Next.js API routes |
| React Query | Works with Next.js |
| `lib/notifications.ts` | Uses `localStorage` and `Notification` API |
| `lib/device-id.ts` | Uses `localStorage` |
| `lib/_core/auth.ts` | Token storage; check for RN-specific usage |
| Tailwind / NativeWind | Replace NativeWind with Tailwind for web |
| `View`, `Text`, `Pressable`, `ScrollView`, etc. | Replace with HTML or a web UI library |

### Hybrid / platform-specific

| Item | Notes |
|------|-------|
| `components/ui/icon-symbol.ios.tsx` | iOS-only; can be removed for web-only |
| `lib/_core/manus-runtime.ts` | Manus embedding; keep if needed |
| `submit.tsx` reverse geocode | Uses `fetch` to Nominatim; portable |

---

## 7. Migration Planning Summary

1. **Routing:** Map expo-router file structure to Next.js `app/` routes; convert `(tabs)` to a layout with nested routes.
2. **UI primitives:** Replace React Native components with HTML or a web component library (e.g. Radix, shadcn).
3. **Storage:** Swap AsyncStorage for `localStorage` in `sightings-cache.ts`.
4. **Map:** Keep LeafletMap; load with `next/dynamic` and `ssr: false`.
5. **Icons:** Replace `@expo/vector-icons` / `expo-symbols` with a web icon set.
6. **Safe areas:** Use CSS `env(safe-area-inset-*)` or Tailwind utilities.
7. **tRPC:** Keep; add or adjust Next.js API route handlers as needed.

---
